title: Dri Aire 5 * 180G Refill Bag Compatible With Premium Moisture Absorber Easy Stick Wall Mount Helps Prevent Damp Mould And Condensation Fast Moisture Absorption
features: Fast Moisture Absorption: The Dri Aire 5*180G Refill Bag quickly absorbs excess moisture from the air, helping to maintain a dry and comfortable environment in your home, bathroom, kitchen, or any damp area with ease.
Prevents Damp And Mould: Designed to reduce the risk of damp, mould, and condensation, the Dri Aire Refill Bag protects walls, furniture, and personal belongings from moisture damage efficiently.

Easy To Use: Simply place the refill bag into your Premium Moisture Absorber Easy Stick Wall Mount. No complicated setup is required, making it a convenient and hassle-free solution for moisture control.

Long-Lasting Performance: Each bag contains 180g of moisture-absorbing crystals, capable of absorbing up to 400ml of water. The pack of 5 ensures you have continuous protection throughout your home for extended periods.

Compact And Convenient: The Dri Aire 5*180G Refill Bags are lightweight, space-saving, and discreet, allowing you to place them in small or hard-to-reach areas while maintaining a fresh and dry atmosphere effortlessly.
description: Keep your home dry and comfortable with the Dri Aire 5*180G Refill Bag. Compatible with the Premium Moisture Absorber Easy Stick Wall Mount, it absorbs up to 400ml of moisture per bag, helping to prevent damp, mould, and condensation. Simple to use, effective, and long-lasting, it’s a convenient solution for any room.
